falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Maybe the reconcile/apply timeout logs are incidental noise and do not require any performance-oriented patch.
falsificationQueries: Check official Convex guidance on mutation execution limits
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: This challenge only partially fails. The primary blocker is policy around exhausted targets, but repeated mutation timeout logs on the apply/error/reconcile path make it likely that some workload reduction or targeted instrumentation is still needed.
